name: ccc-seo-suite
description: CCC SEO AI Suite — full-stack AI-native SEO operation for non-technical teams. Two-layer architecture: 16 atomic skills (engineering substrate) + 6 user-task orchestrators + entry router + 2 artifact/audit skills. Closed GSC learning loop with cohort attribution + per-platform AI citation tracking + multi-content-type / multi-language first-class. Includes engagement-start rescue mode for clients arriving with substantial existing content (50-500 articles from previous agency / in-house work). Built on top of the BenAI marketplace SEO stack with significant CCC extensions for compounding quality.
